holdings.infoBox: EUDG is an equity ETF with a total of 228 individual holdings. The top holdings are Novartis AG stock at 4.94%, Nestlé at 4.78%, Roche Holding AG at 4.38%, LVMH Moët Hennessy - Louis Vuitton, Société Européenne at 3.60%, and Industria de Diseño Textil at 3.53%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Europe Quality Dividend Growth Fund (EUDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of companies in developed Europe, selected for growth characteristics and weighted by total dividends paid. EUDG was launched on May 7, 2014 and is issued by WisdomTree.
infoTable: WisdomTree Europe Quality Dividend Growth Index
